channel.title: Blogs on Hi, I am Sam.
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Hi, I am Sam.

item.title: Keeping track of movies with Emacs and Org mode
item.description: Introduction A while back, I decided to start cataloging the movies I’ve seen. This started as a simple table in Emacs Org mode . Below is an example of the table’s structure: Title Year Genre imdbRating Rating Notes Up 2009 Animation, Adventure, Comedy 8.2 8 / 10 Lots of Balloons WALL-E 2008 Animation, Adventure, Family 8.4 8.3 / 10 Littering is bad Toy Story 1995 Animation, Adventure, Comedy 8.
